summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Premium Creative Director overhaul. ALL 17 features tested and PASSING. Landing page, Dashboard, Paint Shop, Pricing, Showroom, and Kitchen Builder all working correctly with consistent premium styling.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about preloaded resources (og-image.png, Space Grotesk font) not being used - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Premium typography (Outfit + Manrope fonts) applied consistently across all pages
Glassmorphism navigation ('glass' class) working on Landing, Dashboard, Paint Shop, Pricing, Kitchen Builder
Dark theme (#0a0d14) and warm copper accent (#E8592F) applied consistently
High-quality food truck imagery loading correctly on Landing page features section
Dashboard reorganized into 4 categories with correct card counts
Paint Shop color application working with no background bleed on all 6 truck models
test_credentials: No authentication required for tested features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Premium Creative Director overhaul features verified working. Landing page, Dashboard, Paint Shop, Pricing, Showroom, Kitchen Builder all have consistent premium styling with glassmorphism navigation.

1_Landing_Page_Hero.details: Hero section loads with 'Build Your Food Truck Empire' headline, hero image, and two CTAs (Start Building Free, Try the Paint Shop)

2_Landing_Page_Navigation.details: Navigation has glassmorphism 'glass' class, FTLP logo, Paint Shop/Showroom/Pricing links, and Get Started button

3_Landing_Page_Stats.details: Stats section shows: 14+ Pro Tools, 60+ Equipment Items, 6 Truck Models, 7 Launch Phases

4_Landing_Page_Features.details: Feature sections with images load correctly: Truck Configurator, Kitchen Builder, Day One Training - all with high-quality food truck imagery

5_Landing_Page_CTA_Navigation.details: 'Get Started Free' CTA correctly navigates to /dashboard

6_Dashboard_Header.details: Dashboard loads with 'Your Launch Pad' header

7_Dashboard_Categories.details: 4 category sections present: Design & Build, Menu & Recipes, Business Planning, Operations

8_Dashboard_Design_Build_Cards.details: 4 cards present: Paint Shop (with Popular badge), Kitchen Builder, Equipment Showroom, Legacy Paint Shop

9_Dashboard_Menu_Recipes_Cards.details: 3 cards present: Signature Dish, Recipe Builder, Scaling Calculator

10_Dashboard_Business_Planning_Cards.details: 3 cards present: Break-Even Analyzer, Customer Profiling, Readiness Assessment

11_Dashboard_Operations_Cards.details: 4 cards present: Day One Simulator, Crew Training, Payroll Planning, Permits Navigator

12_Dashboard_Card_Navigation.details: Paint Shop link navigates correctly to /paint-shop

13_Paint_Shop_Layout.details: Paint Shop loads with glassmorphism header, truck canvas on left, control panel on right

14_Paint_Shop_Color_Application.details: Color application works with no background bleed - black background stays black when color is applied

15_Paint_Shop_Tabs.details: All 6 tabs switch correctly: Paint, Wraps, Text, Logo, Extras, Photo

16_Pricing_Page_Header.details: Pricing page loads with glassmorphism header styling and FTLP logo

17_Showroom_Page_Sidebar.details: Showroom page loads with FTLP branding in sidebar and 'Equipment Showroom' text

18_Kitchen_Builder_Header.details: Kitchen Builder loads with glassmorphism header and FTLP logo

19_Google_Sign_In_Button.details: Google Sign In button visible on Dashboard when not authenticated: 'Sign In with Google'

console_errors.details: Only expected 401 errors from unauthenticated API calls and minor preload warnings. No React errors or warnings.
